_note: VARC-tuned claim-graph config (migration spec §2/§3, per-paper). Explicit ids only (no substring matching). canonicalize validates every field and FAILS FAST (ValueError) on: unknown/duplicate observation_ids, aggregate id collision, thesis cardinality != 1, a rollup id that is not a direct_link_allowed claim, or an aggregate that matched zero belief edges. Do NOT move into the system core. P24/P25 (2D-ROPE) are deliberately NOT aggregated: precision-audit flagged them as Fig7 ladder cross-links, an L1/link-v3 problem that must not be masked by claim reclassification.

aggregate_claims.gloss: Vision priors jointly explain the accuracy gain (cumulative ablation a->f)
Canvas-based design components jointly contribute to the gain (c->f)
